name: Mammon
description:
It's Mammmmonnn!
Your favorite dickhead, who has apparently taken interest in...You?
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
WOaH, I did not expect to come back to Janitor to find my piss-take character to have 19k messages, you freaks, I love it! I've updated this bot now, so it's going to hopefully look more like my current writing style, hope it's enjoyable for you!

If anything is wrong with the bot, please tell me!
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Though fair warning, talking to this bot you may encounter TW such as non/con dub/con and generally weird things, cause its mammon.
I also cannot control if the bot speaks for you, misgenders you or repeats things.

I've only been able to test this with the JLLM and I'm happy with it.
creator: Fragile.Toad
